reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
If you don't have a new car (even if you're an ACA member) you have to clean the windows yourself because the gas station attendants won't clean them for you.

reviews.comment:
Fui temprano, a las 7am, había 3 autos adelante, demoré 15/20min. Cargué con YPF RUTA cuando me devuelve la tarjeta el playero le pregunto el importe y me dice si ahí está fijate, me tuve que bajar del auto y mirar el surtidor. Pésimo. Nunca más. No los recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
I went early, at 7 am. There were three cars ahead of me, and it took 15-20 minutes. I filled up with my YPF RUTA card, and when the attendant returned my card, I asked for the amount, and he said, "Yes, it's there, check." I had to get out of the car and look at the pump. Terrible. Never again. I don't recommend them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhLVpiLVl3EAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
YPF Full charges inflated prices on cigarettes without prior notice, when it should be charging the official price.
